name: Compyl
description: Compyl — Compliance automation platform mapping technical controls to SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA with evidence collection.

seo.title: Compyl — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Compyl: Compyl — Compliance automation platform mapping technical controls to SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA with evidence collection.

when_to_use: SOC 2 control mapping with automated evidence ingestion
HIPAA technical safeguard documentation and monitoring
ISO 27001 gap analysis with remediation task tracking
Vendor risk program integration with compliance posture
Continuous control monitoring for security team dashboards

pros: Risk register and compliance mapped in one platform
Control mapping across SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, NIST
Pricing more accessible than top-tier competitors
cons: UI polish trails Vanta and Drata
Community and training content still thin
Less third-party validation from large audit firms
review.verdict: A credible challenger in GRC automation, but the big three still win when buyers play it safe.
review.best_for: Mid-market teams wanting risk plus compliance without top-tier pricing
review.not_for: Buyers who prioritize brand familiarity and audit firm integrations
